summary: Continue Story Loop + Smart Paywall - Full E2E Testing Complete

minor.issue: Transient LLM service error (ServiceUnavailableError) - recovered automatically

details: 'Continue Story' CTA visible with pulsing animation (ist-cta-pulse class)
Story title and Part 1 text render correctly
Clicking 'Continue Story' generates Part 2 via POST /api/public/quick-generate with mode=continue
Part 2 text renders with 'PART 2' divider label
After Part 2 renders, CTA text changes to 'Continue to Part 3'
1.5s after Part 2 renders, bottom-sheet teaser slides up
Teaser shows 'Your story is getting intense...'
Teaser can be dismissed via 'Dismiss' button
Clicking 'Continue to Part 3' opens full-screen modal
Cliffhanger text at top ('Wait... it gets even better')
3 benefits listed (Continue story, Turn into video, Share)
3 pricing plans: ₹99/month (pre-selected, 'Most Popular' badge), ₹29 one-time, ₹199 Pro
'Continue My Story' CTA with pulse animation
Clicking paywall close button shows 'Don't lose your story' overlay
'No thanks, I'll pass' button dismisses paywall completely
After 5s on paywall, 'Your story is waiting...' text appears
Clicking 'Continue My Story' redirects to /login?from=experience (when unauthenticated)
If Part 2 generation fails, Part 1 stays visible
Starts fresh with new demo story
Shows below every story part with last cliffhanger sentence
Mobile sticky CTA at bottom works
Hard paywall modal works on mobile

critical_code_review_comments: Code is well-structured with proper data-testid attributes for testing
Funnel tracking is comprehensive with all required events
Rate limiting (20/hr) is appropriate for testing
LLM error handling is graceful with automatic recovery
test_credentials: Not required for this feature (public endpoint)
seed_data_creation: None - uses demo stories from DEMO_STORIES array
context_for_next_testing_agent: Continue Story Loop + Smart Paywall feature is fully functional. All 12 test scenarios passed. Rate limit is set to 20/hr for testing. LLM generation takes 3-12 seconds. Soft teaser appears 1.5s after Part 2, hesitation nudge appears 5s after paywall opens. Discount timer only shows on 2nd+ paywall view.
mocked_apis: None - real LLM generation via Emergent LLM Key
